sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 14.102 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.14)

statement.latex: c) (V.\,Lin). Let$B_n$be the braid group on$n$strings, and let$n>4$. Does$B_n$have proper non-abelian torsion-free factor-groups? Comment of 2001:\/ S.\,P.\,Humphries, (Int. J. Algebra Comput., 11, no.\,3 (2001), 363--373) has constructed a representation of$B_n$which is shown to provide torsion-free non-abelian factor groups of$B_n$as well as of$[B_n, B_n]$for$n < 7$.
